transcript.text:
(Honored to be here in Yeonggwang)
I'm in Yeonggwang(Jeollanam-do) today
But aren't yellow corvina the famous food here?
(It's already popular...) But everyone knows about it
And this area is the barley special district
(So everything is made of...)
(Barley)
(A table full of barley dishes)
(It's a whole new world of barley in Yeonggwang)
(We'll show you what that world is like today)
This is so good...!
(And the dessert is made of barley too...?)
(Is this even real?)
(Even a cute mixed-breed dog, Boree will tag along)
(Endless field of barley)
(Hello Tzuyang!)

Hello, everyone
I'm here in
Yeonggwang, Jeonllanamdo today
And they said they have delicious food ready just for me
I've been seeing this great scenery...
(2 days...?) for 2 days in a row
I thought we were going to shoot the video yesterday so...
When I think of Yeonggwang...
the yellow corvina is the first one that pops up in my mind
So is it going to be fish today?
Oh, there they are!
Thanks for having me
Welcome
(Yeonggwang welcomes Tzuyang)
Can't believe you're really here...
Hello

Here's a little gift...
Pear juice for the welcome drink
(Thirst quencher, the pear juice) Thank you, I was getting thirsty
(It has bellflower and ginger in it too) Yeah, I can taste the bellflower and it's great
She froze because she's a big fan!
(Literally froze) She's really a big fan...
(One of the day ones LOL) I saw your video yesterday too
- Oh, really? - Yeah
Since you're here in Yeonggwang* *Pronounced the same as the word 'Honor'
We're so honored!
Let us have the honor
to serve you Yeonggwang's specialty
(Really honored to be here) Thanks a lot, I plan to enjoy it really
And is it...
yellow corvina that I'll be eating today...?
(It's not a fish...?) That's already popular

But Yeonggwang is actually
the very first barley district in Korea
(The home of barley, Yeonggwanag is famous for various barley dishes)
(Get ready to enjoy a hearty meal made of barley!) We prepared everything made of barley today
(From the rice with barley)
(It's the rice cakes with barley...!)
(Barley tteokbokki*) *Rice cakes
(Would you believe that this is also made of barley...)
(Black barley noodles made of Heuknuri*) *Improved breed of Yeonggwang barley
(And a little help from food giants as well...LOL)
(Here comes the magic sauce...)
(The sesame seeds are from Yeonggwang though LOL)
Let's get that in
(Spicy barley noodles)
(Hot barley noodles)
(Along with 3 cheese-keteers...)

(And even homemade kimchi from the chef's mother-in-law)
(Here they come)
(The barleys are here) That's amazing!
Corndogs
Cheesesticks! Thank you
- This is grilled cheese - Oh, it's cheese!
Barley rice!
(Table full of Yeonggwang's special) The ones that you'll be eating today are all made of barley from Yeonggwang
(Everything has barley in it...?) Even tteokbokki and corndogs?
Yeah, we made them without flour...
The corndog as well...?
Yes, of course, it's covered with barley powder
(The barley dessert is coming soon as well...)
What about the cheese?
(It's from barley-fed cows...LOL)
(Barley everything) It's all barley!

It really is all barley
- Please, enjoy - I will! Thanks so much!
(Yeonggwang's special, barley meal) I thought I was going to get the fish but this is quite unexpected
Can't believe it's all made of barley
Bon Appetit!
Even the rice has barley, it's legit!
I actually do enjoy eating barley rice
rather than plain rice!
(Barley jibjang*) I'll mix it up with this homemade paste later *Soybean & chili paste
(But the name sounds unfamiliar...) But I'm not sure what it's made of...is it soybean?
Oh, it's a new one!
I think it has chili and soybean paste
mixed together!
(Let's try that out later...) I wonder what it tastes like
Whoa, and look at the cheese!
I want this,

I really wanted to try this one first
It's so well cooked!
(3 high-pitched tones...!)
I've tried many kinds of grilled cheese actually
But this one's the savoriest one!
It's so savory and delicious
I'll get another one
Cheese skewers
It's so good!
Corndogs!
They said the cheese has barley powder in it too
(It's a wave of barley)
Should I dip it in the tteokbokki* sauce? *Rice cakes
Let's dip it in...
The sausage has great texture and taste
And even the sauce is delicious!

Now to the main event, barley noodles
(It's barley, not buckwheat)
Looks delicious
Oh, I can,
I can tell
it's savory and delicious already
And...
The noodle itself is really great...!
Whoa!
I really like it because
it's chewier than plain noodles
But it's softer than the buckwheat noodles
This one has only the good sides of those two noodles
They said...
this noodle doesn't have any flour in it
It's 100% barley

So it's said it's easily digested
(I can eat this all day...) Does that mean I can eat all day?
It's really great
(CLEARED 1 bowl of noodles)
(Watch out for cuteness overdose) I think he smelled it
Haha, look at him!
That's just adorable
(Cuteness overload...!) Come here
(Smack)
(I guess she won't feed me...)
(But I know you will!! LOL)
(No food, no show sir...)
- It's really great! - Oh, really?
(From the food giant...) It's ready-made sauce
Why do you use ready-made ones?
(Not ready with her own ver. of sauce...)

How's the noodle?
I wish I could bring it home
It's just too good
- The texture is... - That's a relief
(Q. How are the noodles?)
(Correct answer) It's chewy and delicious...
- You should try the warm broth - This one?
- (Impressed) It's great! - We got some powders
for the broth
So you sell these?
- It comes in meal kits - Oh, the meal kits!
Yeah, to make it easier
(The meal kits will be shown later) It's just like making instant noodles, but you make the sauce separately
So that means...
(Gazes) You can also boil the noodles separately...
Oh, you mean the sauce...

(We're ready, give us a call food giants!)
(Let's try the warm noodles...!) Whoa, this is a lot
Whoa, I can't even describe it in words
Let's get some kimchi too
(Smoothly made the transition to radish...) The radish kimchi is great too
It's from my mother-in-law...!
- We used barley powder for starch - It has of barley powder too?
What about this one?
That's rice punch, purely organic
Mmm!! It's so sweet!!
It's got that rich sweetness and it's good!
Let me just...
finish up what I was eating
- This is just great... - My goodness!!!
(Much thanks to her mother-in-law)
(Kimchi-holic) It's delicious

Ma'am! She likes it!!!
I love it
I should try this with tteokbokki
with a dash of sauce!
I'll try tteokbokki!
And wow, I can
(From the looks of it...!) already tell it's chewy
which is the texture that I like
It's different from the rice ones
I think I've
never tried...
anything like this!
(Rice cakes) The rice cakes are kinda stretchy
and this one's a bit crunchy
The texture is just amazing
I really like it

What's the ratio of barley?
- It's 10% - So it's 90% rice and 10% barley?
(The 10% can make a huge difference)
Now to the cheese stick!
I think it'll taste great with this
Let's dip that in
(Heated) She warmed up the dish for me
Awesome!
(You want some?)
(I know you won't)
(Totally satisfied)
I'm glad you like the food...
How's that for 1 serving?
I think it's quite a lot
I think some of them
has more noodles while...

Is it all the same?!
I eyeballed the amount...
(So the amount is not equal...)
Wow, so you get this in here
And she said
it has barley sprout powder and gold hibiscus powder
The gold hibiscus powder is known to have a lot of minerals, which is great for the skin
(Let's throw that paste in!)
It's chili paste based, and
It has dried radishes in it
This one looks great!
So I guess you can say it's well-seasoned chili paste
(Looks tastier because you already know the flavor...) Looks delicious
(Hurried)
Oh, wow
(Came back with sesame oil...!!) Thank you

Now this is that magic oil
Let's get a spoonful of it
The paste is really great
It'll be perfect for bibimbap
It's a must!
to have
sesame oil to Bibimbap
Ever tried barley sprout powder?
(Shakes her head)
(The benefits of barley sprout) It's made of young barley sprouts
(1. Good for the immune system) It basically serves as a cleaner in our body
(2. It's known to have a detox effect, so it's great for heavy drinkers) (3. Great for losing weight and preventing osteoporosis)
And if the kids have constipation
Just throw this into the yogurt
(And the problem is solved)
LOLOLOL

Oh, I shouldn't have brought that up
(Digestion mastery LV.99999999) I don't think I should have it
(Her ability far surpassed that of humans) It'll really make things worse for me...
This one's great for hangovers
(Buckwheat?) I could use another bowl of buckwheat
(Ooops) I mean barley noodles
Spicy buckwheat noodles!
It's spicy barley noodles..!!
(Got the name wrong 3 times in a row) I'm so sorry
(Exchanging apologies) What did I just say!
Did you really just say buckwheat?
(Making excuses) It just naturally came out
(You gotta say it right!) because the color was black...
And it's an improved breed called 'Heuknuri'
It was developed by Rural Development Administration!
(So there's the explanation! LOL) I'm so sorry

(It's spicy BARLEY noodles!
(Trying to get back at her) The portions of noodles are all different
LOLOLOL
Sorry about that
What have I done really?
(R-revenge...success...?!)
(Really digging into corndogs...)
(We got the noodle maniac again...!)
(Finished the barley noodles)
(And bibimbap as well)
She warmed up the tteokbokki for me
So it's really warm
Bon Appetit
It's rice cake, but a soft one
The grilled cheese was really great too
I think it'll make a good combo with meat on campsites

I'll dip this cheese stick in here as well
She warmed up the cheese stick as well
(Cheese stretching out endlessly...!!!)
(Huh?)
Whoa! Is it thin ice?
That's the barley punch
- Oh, the barley punch?! - Yeah
(It's made of barley instead of rice) I can see the barley floating down here, it's so cool
(Ever tried barley punch?) Whoa! I can really taste the barley
It tastes like rice punch in the beginning but it gets different at the end
(The sun is getting low and so is the temperature)
(And The life savor enters the scene!) Thank you!
She warmed up the broth
(That's so nice...)
It's all empty...LOL
(I'm almost done cleaning them) She emptied all of them

(Except for the veggies...)
(And why is the egg still there)
You got the sauce all over your sleeves
Yikes!!
(But there's nothing I can do)
That happened because you didn't eat your veggies LOL
My daughter's watching now...
(Eat your veggies everyone LOL) I should really do something
(Pulls it up)
(She ate 12 servings of noodles...)
The tteokbokki meal kit is for 2 to 3 people
- This also comes in a meal kit? - Yeah! All the ingredients are packaged separately
This tteokbokki is really great
It's a meal kit but it's great
Let's split this in half
(Could it be...) Is this also from barley-fed chicken?

It's just a plain egg LOLOLOL!
The sauce is really great
(Had to applaud for this one...)
So I've tried various dishes made of barley from Yeonggwang
I really enjoyed all of them and all of the dishes
comes in meal kits as well!
It's delicious and good for your health as well!
So let me show you the collection
So all of these meal kits
have barley from Yeonggwang, Jeonnam
It's the same ones I just ate, but packaged in meal kits
They also got barley bread
Barley snacks!
There's the barley sprout powder
that I'd like to have
You can put it in when cooking rice

or noodles as well, and it's good for digestion!
What's this one?
Oh, it's the gold hibiscus that I had when eating rice earlier!
There's the barley punch
Oh! This one's the cheese!
I think it'll make a great dish for campsites
This is yogurt made with milk from barley-fed cows
And what's he doing now?!?!
(What's going on...?)
(Halt! You chopstick thief!!!)
(He just might be the cutest thief in the world)
This is the pear juice
It's also got bellflower in it, so delicious
Now to the tteokbokki!
It's the same one I just ate, it's really great
They even have soju?

('Tok Hanjan Soju' and 'Yeonggwang Soju') I'd love to try one of them
Oh, it's a strong one?
45 degrees...?!
(Even better...LOL) That sounds more intriguing!
We got a barley punch over here!
This sure was something
We got cheese sticks
(Her favorite one today) and black barley noodles
I see donuts
and even cookies!
And even a barley madeleine...?
(A clam-shaped french dessert, madeleine!)
Ugh, come here, you're so cute!
(The cutie-pie is here...!) Oops, I'm sorry
(Who is this cute little one...?!)
Come here now, let's go to boriall!

All the food made of barley
can be purchased at 'Boriall' website
I'll leave the link in the description if you want to check it out
(Show us your support!)
Even the desserts are made of barley!
This is a high-protein snack
made of barley from Yeonggwang
I love the smell of the sweet potato
(A healthy snack with low calories...!)
Let's try something else!
It's barley bread
Oh, it's got red bean paste in it
It's so good
And what's this now?
Oh! That's the yogurt!
It's handmade

(The yogurt tastes savorier as it's from barley-fed cows)
It's great
(Next one)
It's barley madeleine!
Ta-da
And the barley donuts as well..!
Mmm! It's delicious
It's so sweet as well
Should I try the cookie?
It's a soft one rather than a crispy one
(Smelling it first) Mmm! Smells delicious
I see some nuts in there
(I can smell sugar!!!!)
(Extremely scared...)
Is it gone?
(Still here LOL!!!!) What is that?

I think it's a big moss
(Chaos)
(Scared as well...)
(Just like how we met honeybees last time...)
(Run for your lives!!!!)
And this is!
(It's Salute Handmade Yogurt from Mir Farm)
(Adding the strawberries!)
(It's handmade strawberry yogurt!)
(Tried all the desserts made of Yeonggwang barley!)
All the dishes that I ate just now
got Yeonggwang barley in them
You can get this delicious food
from the website, 'Boriall'
So make sure you check it out if you're interested!
Thanks for the great meal today!

(And we got another delicious food here...)
(Ta-da) Hello, everyone
Today, I've brought
(Sweet and sour!) some tangerines
I'm currently
("Way to go! Domestic Fruits!" with TMON!) an honorary ambassador for domestic fruits
(The sixth one, it's tangerine)
("Way to go! Domestic Fruits!" Dec. 1st, Tangerine Day)
So I've brought tangerines from domestic farms
I'll try them one by one
(Early season mandarin orange)
(Golden orange)
(You oughta have it at this time of year) This one looks really delicious
I just can't get enough of these
(Don't everyone eat the whole box?) I always ate the whole box by myself...
(So fresh)

It's really delicious...!
The reason why Dec. 1st is the tangerine day
is because they sell the ones that are
sweet with 12 brix, and 1% of sourness, so it's Dec. 1st
It's (amazingly) delicious
Here's how to peel it off
If you press on to it for a while, the skin and the flesh will come apart
(Let me show you a good example...)
I give up!
(I'll read the description just to make it exact)
(The efficacy of tangerine) (As tangerines are alkaline, they can enhance the metabolism)
(Great for preventing cold by strengthening skin and mucous) The vitamin C helps skin improvement and overcome fatigue)
(Helps the consumption of calcium, great for preventing arteriosclerosis and high blood pressure)
This one's called golden orange
(Let's peel it off nicely...)
(Success) Looks great

I thought the tangerines
are only great for wintertimes
But it turns out you can eat it all year long
From April to October, you can get the house tangerine
(Available for all seasons) Kara mandarins, setoka, golden oranges...there are several kinds...
(Enjoy your tangerine all year long!) So it doesn't have to be winter to get these tangerines
This is by far the most delicious one I had, I'm so surprised!
And you know how you can use the peels, right?
For getting rid of the fishy smell or anything that smells bad
Cleaning the glasses, erasing the scribbles on the desk
You can always get these tangerines at local stores
or Hanaro Mart
or from TMON on the Domestic Fruit Day
I'll enjoy the rest while watching the movie
Hope you can support the domestic fruit industry!
Thanks for the great food again!
